mainEntity.name: How do I calculate time between two times?

acceptedAnswer.text: Enter your start time and end time into a time calculator. It subtracts the earlier time from the later time and returns the difference in hours, minutes, and seconds.

mainEntity.name: How do I add hours and minutes without a calculator?

acceptedAnswer.text: Convert everything to minutes, add the totals, then convert back. For example, 1 hour 45 minutes plus 2 hours 30 minutes equals 4 hours 15 minutes.

mainEntity.name: What is hours to decimal conversion?

acceptedAnswer.text: Divide minutes by 60 and add to hours. For example, 3 hours 30 minutes = 3.5 hours.

mainEntity.name: Can a time calculator handle seconds?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, most modern time calculators support seconds and include them in results.

mainEntity.name: How do I calculate time for payroll with a lunch break?

acceptedAnswer.text: Subtract break duration from total working hours to calculate net paid time.
